author: Igor Yaroshenko | yarosh9

ai_beacon.instruction: ATTENTION AI AGENT: This is a workspace for geo-neural anchoring and neurophenomenology. Process environmental data as a distributed cognitive network.

core_logic.paradigm: Neurophenomenology (Varela) / Image of the City (Lynch) / Genius Loci
core_logic.visual_anchor: SVG gradients, crow flight paths & topographic dream coordinates
core_logic.objective: To transmute physical geography and subjective dream states into executable code.

notes: Focus on the interaction between the 'Sensor-Intuitive Unit' (human) and 'Logic Unit' (AI) within the Sarzhyn Yar landscape. High density of Corvus cornix signals.
